category_sources: source_facts.description: CLI tool for Cooklang-formatted recipes; official Cooklang docs describe CookCLI recipe, shopping-list, server, search, import, doctor, seed, report commands at https://cooklang.org/docs/getting-started-commands/
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README identifies the project as CookCLI at https://github.com/cooklang/cookcli; source_facts.name is cookcli
docs_sources: Official Cooklang documentation page for CookCLI commands at https://cooklang.org/docs/getting-started-commands/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cooklang/cookcli; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI for Cooklang recipes; official CookCLI docs list recipe management, shopping-list generation, and server commands
